M-003.NAME: vpn
M-003.owns: vpn clients, profile-consistent config generation, QR, topology-aware provisioning, legacy VPNServer compatibility, device-bound peer management, handshake monitoring

exports.fn-provision_client: Create or retrieve VPN client with device-bound peer
exports.fn-generate_config: Generate WG/AWG config text for a specific client and node
exports.fn-revoke_client: Revoke client peer and free device slot
exports.fn-rotate_client: Generate new peer credentials for existing client
exports.fn-get_client_stats: Return traffic and connection stats for a client
exports.fn-pending-trial-config-access: Allow pending trial users to retrieve first VPN config and activate trial after first observed handshake
exports.fn-render-stealth-config: Render client configs with deploy-time CLIENT_PROFILE and optional per-client preshared key

disaster-recovery-role.role-1: Phase-22 recovery validation must prove restored VPN configs, device-bound clients, and AWG profile rendering remain compatible with existing users.
disaster-recovery-role.role-2: Existing client configs must not be silently invalidated; rotation requires explicit operator approval.

M-003.hotspot: H-001: Topology migration carries legacy VPNServer compatibility
H-013: VPN service split into 4 files — import paths must remain stable
H-017: Client configs must match RU awg0 CLIENT_PROFILE exactly or handshakes fail

phase-45-scope.primary-behaviors: pending trial grants first config access; /vpn/stats can trigger idempotent trial activation from last_handshake_at.
phase-45-scope.evidence: 2026-06-01: Phase-45 backend suite passed and preserved vpn_router_compat coverage.

phase-70-scope.primary-behaviors: Payload-preserving QR PNG builder uses level M, smaller box size, and route-compatible /config/qr responses; API config, download bytes, and QR payload source remain identical.
phase-70-scope.evidence: 2026-06-04: tests/test_vpn_router_compat.py, tests/test_vpn_service.py, tests/test_manual_client_cli.py, frontend build, Phase-48/57/62/70 smokes, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, and protected deploy/runtime guards passed locally.
